parameters.formDescription: Upload 2–4 PDFs and a company name to evaluate a deal.

meta.description:
Phase 3 initial workflow. Two nodes: Form Trigger (accepts Company Name + 2–4 PDF uploads) → Coordinator Code node (emits run_id, deal_id, source_manifest with classified source_types, passes binary through).

Next iteration adds: Extract from File, Text Splitter, Embeddings HTTP Request (Alicloud), Simple Vector Store.
